name: SimpleSweep
description: Step 12.0 baseline — mirror variant. Every available bot pilots the SAME deck (bulwark-control) so any win-rate spread is attributable to pilot skill, not deck choice. bulwark-control is chosen because it's the closer-less deck surfaced by 12.0's first run; if any bot can make it win, that's a meaningful result. Includes self-mirrors so we see per-bot seed variance. Pairs with the canonical PairCorrectly run to separate deck signal from bot signal in 12.0's baseline artifacts.

text: Tournament 'SimpleSweep' ran 840 games across 21 matchup(s). Pairs: Fort=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-fortress), Hell=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire), Reap=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper), Wave=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker), Util=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:utility), Fixed=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:fixed)

Matchup Fort vs Fort: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress'. Tied 2-2-36 over 40 games. Self-mirror — indicates raw seed-driven variance and whether the pairing is stable given the RNG. Average game length: 387 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Hell: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire'. Fort won 3/40 (BWins:1,Draws:36, 8%). Same deck, different bots: 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' pilots 'bulwark-control' better than 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire' in decisive games (4 of 40). Treat as evidence of pilot skill on this deck. Average game length: 387 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Reap: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper'. Fort won 2/40 (BWins:1,Draws:37, 5%). Same deck, different bots — bots are roughly comparable here, so pick by preference. Average game length: 397 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Wave: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker'. Fort won 4/40 (BWins:2,Draws:34, 10%). Same deck, different bots — bots are roughly comparable here, so pick by preference. Average game length: 371 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Util: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'utility'. Fort won 2/40 (BWins:1,Draws:37, 5%). Same deck, different bots — bots are roughly comparable here, so pick by preference. Average game length: 395 steps.

Matchup Fort vs Fixed: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'fixed'. Tied 0-0-40 over 40 games. Every game drew — no signal about which pair is stronger. Inspect the encoding for stall loops or raise maxInputsPerGame before drawing conclusions. Average game length: 422 steps.

Self-mirror that stalled out on every game — no signal at all; the matchup's RNG + bot combination never closes out. Consider raising maxInputsPerGame or inspecting the encoding for stall loops. Average game length: 422 steps.

Across all matchups, 'Wave' (deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker) outperformed 'Fixed' (deck:bulwark-control,bot:fixed). Pattern: the top pair's bot profile is worth studying as a candidate to pair with similar decks; the weakest pair suggests either a weight-table mismatch or a deck that disagrees with the bot's scoring priorities.
Observation: Close race: 'Wave' edges out runner-up by 1 points — consider more games per matchup.
Observation: 21 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

LEARNING HINT: When choosing a bot for a new deck, prefer profiles whose matched decks in this tournament share archetype tags (aggro/control/midrange) with the new deck. Avoid pairing a utility bot tuned for defence with an aggro deck — it will underweight tempo plays.
